[21CIt is written in the Book of Huan Ti:

[25CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[25Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[25CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[25Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[25Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[25CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[21CYour god Huan Ti seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[21Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[21CYou, a newly trained Candidate, have been heralded
[21Cfrom birth as the instrument of Huan Ti.  You are destined
[21Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[21Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[21Cof us all:  Go bravely with Huan Ti!
[21C--More--

engravings.text: You "quaff" potions with 'q'
Use 'Z' to cast a spell
Read the spellbook with 'r'
Pick up the spellbook with ','
Spellcasting
Can't get through?  You're carrying too much.
UNDER CONSTRUCTION
Use '>' to go down the stairs
Remove accessories with 'R'
Put on accessories with 'P'
Swap weapons quickly with 'x'
Use 'X' to use two weapons at once
Use 'e' to eat edible things
Travel across the level with '_'
You can run by prefixing a movement key with 'G'
Magic wands are used with 'z'
Containers can also be emptied with 'Alt-T'
You loot containers with 'M-l'
You can wait a turn with '.'
Firing launches items from your quiver; Use 'Q' to put items in it
Use 'f' to fire missiles with the wielded launcher
Wield the sling
Missiles, such as rocks, work better when fired from appropriate launcher
Throw items with 't'
You can drop partial stacks by prefixing the item slot letter with a number
Drop items with 'd'
Avoid being burdened, it slows you down
Another magic portal, a way to leave this tutorial
Pick up this scroll, read it with 'r', and try to remove the armor again
Some items have shuffled descriptions, different each game
Take off armor with 'T'
Push boulders by moving into them
Step into this portal to leave the tutorial
Now you know the very basics. You can leave the tutorial via the magic portal.
Hit monsters by walking into them.
Wield weapons with 'w'
Wear armor with 'W'
Pick up items with ','
Some traps can be disabled with 'M-u'
There are four traps next to you! Search for them.
Behind this door is a dark corridor

Use 's' to search for secret doors
Look around the map with ';', press ESC when you're done

You can leave the tutorial via the magic portal.
Close the door with 'c'
Open the door by moving into it

Move diagonally with b u n y
